extension.summary: Hardened NordVPN WireGuard Manager for Raspberry Pi 5
extension.description: High-performance VPN manager for LibreELEC. Uses NordLynx for maximum speed with an automated Systemd watchdog to prevent connection drops.[CR][CR][B]Note:[/B] This addon is designed specifically for the LibreELEC filesystem and will not work on standard Android or Windows Kodi installations.[CR][CR][B]Features:[/B][CR]• WireGuard Native (NordLynx)[CR]• Smart Watchdog & Auto-Regen[CR]• Hard Reset Routing Tables[CR][CR][B]Disclaimer:[/B] Not an official NordVPN product. Use at your own risk. This addon is provided "as is" without warranty. The developer is not liable for data loss or security breaches. Full disclaimer available in addon settings.
extension.news:
v1.2.0 (2026-04-21)
- IMPROVED settings.xml.
v1.1.9 (2026-04-20)
- ADDED (Auto-Healing): Watchdog automatically resets the retry budget when a physical network change (Eth/WiFi) is detected. - ADDED (High-Visibility Alerts): Enhanced blackout notifications with Red/Bold formatting and custom ICON_ERROR support. - ADDED (Intelligent Throttling): Helper now stands down after 10 failed attempts to preserve system resources and NordVPN API limits. - ADDED (Smarter Connection Logic): Added pre-connection gateway validation to identify "No Internet" vs "VPN Handshake Failure." - FIXED (Stability): Implemented a global lock-file to prevent Watchdog/Helper race conditions and "double-triggers." - FIXED (Stability): Refined interface tracking to ignore virtual wg0 tunnels, ensuring the retry counter only resets on real hardware events. - IMPROVED (Log Clarity): Reduced log levels for routine heartbeat checks to keep the system journal clean. - IMPROVED (Performance): Increased polling frequency to 1Hz for near-instant physical disconnect detection. - IMPROVED (Stability): Integrated aggressive "Double Stop" logic in a non-blocking thread to resolve player hangs faster.
v1.1.8 (2026-04-20)
- ADDED (Smart Recovery): Implemented a 10-minute (120-attempt) gateway timeout with automatic Systemd retry. - FIXED (Logic): Throttled UI notifications to once per minute to prevent user annoyance. - FIXED (Systemd): Moved rate-limiters from [Service] to [Unit] to fix the "unknown key" error. - IMPROVED (Architecture): Moved hardware-level carrier detection to network_utils.py. - IMPROVED (Centralization): Unified all network functions into network_utils.py, allowing multiple files (vpn_ops.py, service.py, vpn_core.py) to share the same reliable logic. - REMOVED (Hardcoding): Deleted GATEWAY_FALLBACK and DNS_FALLBACK; system now uses dynamic OS/API values.
v1.1.7 (2026-04-19) - fixed service watchdog spamming journal when not on DEBUG logging on.
v1.1.6 (2026-04-19) - IMPROVED: Major overhaul of watchdog logic for stable Pi 5 network failover. - FIXED: Resolved "script aborted" errors in reconnect helper by mocking Kodi modules for standalone execution. - FIXED: Added SID discovery logic to ensure successful reconnections when VPN names contain spaces. - OPTIMIZED: Level-based logging (INFO/DEBUG) to prevent log spam while maintaining high-detail troubleshooting. - UPDATED: Faster recovery timers and hardened DNS/IPv6 handling during interface swaps. - Optimized for Raspberry Pi 5: Increased OS interface release delay to 1000ms to prevent routing table race conditions. - Implemented "Safety Pin" Session Protection: Manual VPN connections now persist through Home screen transitions, even with WiFi latency. - Smart Override: Mapped addons now correctly override manual sessions and perform auto-cleanup on exit. - Hard-coded Gateway Fallback: Added support for 192.168.178.1 (Fritz!Box) or other routing restoration if the system fails to auto-detect the route. - Robust Logging: Integrated Watchdog and Network Utility events into the primary Kodi log for better troubleshooting. - Improved Auto-Cleanup: Added a 6-second grace period when exiting streams to prevent accidental disconnects during UI refreshes.
v1.1.5 (2026-04-16) - Optimized for Raspberry Pi 5: Total VPN switch time reduced to ~1.0s. - Centralized Timings: All delays moved to vpn_config.py for easy tuning. - Robust Reconnect: Refined Ethernet-to-WiFi failover and interface priority logic. - Standalone Watchdog: Background service decoupled from Kodi modules to prevent crashes. - Improved Monitoring: Added detailed PURPOSE DEBUG logging for all wait states via SSH. - Dynamic Tagging: Version-independent log tagging for cleaner SSH monitoring. - Security: Forced file-based flags for manual session persistence during network swaps.
v1.1.4 (2026-04-15) - Fixed infinite reconnect loop when navigating to Home screen. - Added 'Intentional Disconnect' flag to mute Watchdog during auto-cleanup. - Improved Home screen detection to bypass stale Kodi plugin labels. - Optimized Watchdog to ignore 'Ethernet back' events if VPN is already active. - Increased Watchdog grace period to 45s for stable Pi 5 network switching. - Added optional Debug Logging for trigger matching (visible when Kodi Debug is enabled).
v1.1.3 (2026-04-15) - Added: Automatic Ethernet-to-Wi-Fi Failover and Failback support. - Added: Background Watchdog service for connection persistence. - Added: Kernel-level IPv6 disabling to prevent DNS leaks. - Added: Dynamic gateway discovery (works on any router/network). - Added: 5-second grace period for auto-mappings to prevent race conditions. - Added: Visual notifications for network state changes and failover. - Improved: Deep-cleaning of "ghost" routes during disconnect. - Improved: Monitoring logic to reduce false "Network Loss" alerts.
v1.1.2 (2026-04-15) - FIXED: Resolved "Keymapping error" by implementing a direct-write logging system for background processes. - IMPROVED: Enhanced Watchdog with a 30-second network-aware boot delay to prevent startup crashes. - IMPROVED: Standardized log formatting (Thread ID and alignment) to match native Kodi logs. - FIXED: Improved Bash Regen script compatibility with BusyBox/LibreELEC for reliable version detection. - SECURITY: Removed unused system dependencies to eliminate "missing addon" warnings at startup.
v1.1.1 (2026-04-13) - Fixed install-from-zip issue by moving file setup to service startup - Improved Kodi 19-21+ compatibility by migrating to xbmcvfs.translatePath - Renamed addon to WireGuard Manager for better consistency - Added automated installation and cleanup of vpn-watchdog.service - Integrated logger.py for comprehensive system-wide logging - Streamlined setup process for template configs and keymaps - Fixed token import logic to handle direct file browsing
v1.1.0 (2026-04-13) - SECURITY: Added DNS Search Domain hardening to prevent local network metadata leaks. - FIXED: Watchdog service path resolution and startup syntax errors. - IMPROVED: Standardized logging level to LOGINFO for better visibility. - IMPROVED: Refined connection state tracking for v1.1 series.
v1.0.9 (2026-04-12) - Added "Manual Override" state tracking to prevent auto-disconnect conflicts. - Integrated friendly addon name resolution for improved trigger logging. - Standardized logging across all modules (Service, Menu, Core, and Watchdog). - Optimized network metric and IPv6 handling with centralized vpn_ops logic. - Improved connection verification with strict curl timeouts and country detection.
v1.0.8 - Fixed error in def run_loop of class WGManagerService.
- v1.0.7 - Fixed DNS leaks by forcing VPN nameservers on physical interfaces. - Added automatic IPv6 disabling to prevent "around-the-tunnel" leaks. - Improved code efficiency by moving network logic to a shared library. - Enhanced logging with a rotating file handler for easier debugging.
v1.0.6 - NordVPN's Linux client and NordLynx protocol (based on WireGuard) generally prioritize IPv4 traffic and often do not support IPv6 natively, leading to potential IPv6 leaks or connectivity issues. - Added: Automatic IPv6 leak protection (forces IPv6 OFF before connecting). - Added: IPv6 restoration to "Auto" mode upon VPN disconnection. - Added: Routing table cleanup (cache flush) to remove stagnant host routes. - Fixed: Improved network stability by managing interface metrics and WiFi states. - Optimized: Full compatibility with LibreELEC/ConnMan for Raspberry Pi 5.
v1.0.5 - fix logging service, service_helper and menu
v1.0.4 - Cleaned up logging
v1.0.3 - Cleaned up files and new icons
v1.0.2 - Security: Added automatic IPv6 Leak Protection. The manager now identifies and disables IPv6 on Ethernet and Wi-Fi. - Routing Fix: Implemented Metric priority (Metric 100) for Ethernet to ensure VPN traffic always takes precedence. - Hardware: Added Wi-Fi Kill Switch. Automatically disables Wi-Fi when Ethernet is connected to prevent multi-interface leaks. - Setup: Improved first-run logic with a dedicated Keymap installation, mandatory Restart prompt, and Token Import wizard. - Mapping: Slot assignments are now "Regen-Proof." They use Friendly Names (e.g., NordVPN_Belgium) instead of static IPs. - UI: Synchronized notifications between the manual menu and background service, including progress bars and IP info lookups. - Keymap: Removed the Blue button mapping from the keymap as it was found to be incompatible. - Cleanup: Enhanced Factory Reset to purge NordVPN-specific configs and properly decommission legacy system services.
v1.0.1 - Added: Smart Add-on Mapping (Auto-connect VPN based on which TV add-on is open) - Added: Visual Setup Wizard to easily assign WireGuard profiles to slots - Added: Dynamic background monitoring for Kodi 21.3 (Omega) - Improved: Log-less trigger detection for better performance on Pi 5 - Fixed: Resolved service-start delays in LibreELEC 12.2.1
v1.0.0 - Fixed: RunScript reinstall command argument parsing - Improved: Main logic execution order for better setup handling - Added: Enhanced logging for LibreELEC
